title: Eric S. Trautmann
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Eric S. Trautmann''' was an author and co-author of several [[roleplaying game]] books for [[West End Games]], and articles for the ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]''. Eric Trautmann is married to the famous owner of Olympic Cards and Comics in Lacey, Washington, where he appears periodically as a guest speaker. He has worked on other franchises, created story bibles for Halo and  Crimson Skies, as well as numerous comics including Lazarus and Forged.

{{Author-stub}}

==''Star Wars'' bibliography==
===Author or co-author===
*''[[The Politics of Contraband]]''. [[1992]]
*''[[Star Wars Gamemaster Handbook]]''. [[1993]]
*''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]''. [[1993]]
*''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]''. [[1994]]
*[[Galaxy Guide 6: Tramp Freighters (Second Edition)|''Galaxy Guide 6: Tramp Freighters'', Second Edition]]. [[1994]]
*''[[The Last Command Sourcebook]]''. [[1994]]
*''[[Classic Adventures]]''. [[1995]]
*''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]''. [[1995]]
*''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]''. [[1996]]
*''[[The Kathol Rift]]''. [[1996]]
*{{GalaxyCite|8|Dark Vendetta}}
*''[[Cracken's Threat Dossier]]''. [[1997]]
*''[[Endgame]]''. [[1997]]
*''[[Player's Guide to Tapani]]''. [[1997]]
*{{Journal|12|Heroes Need Not Apply}}. [[1997]]
*{{Journal|14|Droid Datalog}}. [[1997]]
*''[[Hideouts & Strongholds]]''. [[1998]]
*{{Journal|15|Alien Encounter: The Shard}}. [[1998]]
